sources.excerpt:
Artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) are integral to industrial plant engineering, particularly in asset-intensive sectors such as power generation, chemical processing, refining and advanced manufacturing. AI and ML enable engineers and operators to move beyond reactive and time-based practices toward predictive, prescriptive and autonomous decision-making.
